---
title: Countries Data Dictionary
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## The Countries Data

This data set maps three-letter (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3) and two-letter (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2) country codes to country names. It can be joined to the `hotels` data set to identify the country of origin for each booking.

### Variables: `countries.csv`

`country_name`: Name of the country.

`alpha_2`: Two-character country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-2).

`alpha_3`: Three-character country code (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3).
